questions.text: What is the purpose of the Retreatment program within the SAP Lease Administration by NAKISA?
options: To enhance the software's user interface
To avoid double costs in IFRS from depreciation and incoming invoice

questions.text: Which tool is used for lease asset contract management under IFRS16?
What types of financial postings are managed by the leased asset contract financials?
options: G/L postings, Depreciation postings, Invoice postings

questions.text: How often must the 'amount frequency' and 'payment frequency' be defined in a financial term?
What does the amount frequency indicate in a lease contract?
options: The total duration of the lease
How frequently the total amount is applied

questions.text: What is the primary benefit of using parallel ledgers in SAP Lease Administration?
options: Supports compliance with new regulatory standards

questions.text: What can be generated by NAKISA for new contracts when no external invoice will be sent?
Depreciation postings come from the S/4 Asset accounting process.
The new version of the Retreatment program is used to manage customer relationships.
Payable items for new contracts can be generated automatically by NAKISA if no external invoice is expected.
